query:
UPDATE orders o
INNER JOIN cityPartnerConfig c ON o.deliveryCity = c.city
SET o.partnerFee = ROUND((CAST(o.courseAmount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(o.teacherFee AS DECIMAL(10,2))) * c.partnerFeeRate, 2)
WHERE o.courseAmount IS NOT NULL 
  AND o.courseAmount != '0.00'
  AND o.teacherFee IS NOT NULL
  AND c.isActive = 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute UPDATE orders o
INNER JOIN cityPartnerConfig c ON o.deliveryCity = c.city
SET o.partnerFee = ROUND((CAST(o.courseAmount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(o.teacherFee AS DECIMAL(10,2))) * c.partnerFeeRate, 2)
WHERE o.courseAmount IS NOT NULL 
  AND o.courseAmount != '0.00'
  AND o.teacherFee IS NOT NULL
  AND c.isActive = 1;
